name: Hwei

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Signature of the Visionary
passive.description_source: Innate:  Hwei's damaging abilities mark enemies hit for a short time. Damaging them with a different ability consumes the mark to create an explosion at their location that deals magic damage in an area.

effects.description: Innate: Hwei's damaging abilities mark enemies hit for 4 seconds. Subsequent damaging abilities against marked targets consume the mark to create an explosion beneath them, dealing 35 : 252.94 (based on level) (+ 35% AP) bonus magic damage to enemies in the area after a 0.85-second delay.

passive.description: Innate: Hwei's damaging abilities mark enemies hit for 4 seconds. Subsequent damaging abilities against marked targets consume the mark to create an explosion beneath them, dealing 35 : 252.94 (based on level) (+ 35% AP) bonus magic damage to enemies in the area after a 0.85-second delay.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The ability that consumes the mark cannot apply it on the same cast instance.

basic_ability_1.name: Subject: Disaster
basic_ability_1.description_source:
Active:  Hwei enters a disastrous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as  Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
 Devastating Fire (QQ)
 Severing Bolt (QW)
 Molten Fissure (QE)

effects.description: Toggle: Hwei enters a disastrous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.

basic_ability_1.description: Toggle: Hwei enters a disastrous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Toggled abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

basic_ability_2.name: Subject: Serenity
basic_ability_2.description_source:
Active:  Hwei enters a serene mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as  Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
 Fleeting Current (WQ)
 Pool of Reflection (WW)
 Stirring Lights (WE)

effects.description: Toggle: Hwei enters a serene mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.

basic_ability_2.description: Toggle: Hwei enters a serene mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Toggled abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

basic_ability_3.name: Subject: Torment
basic_ability_3.description_source:
Active:  Hwei enters a tumultuous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as  Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
 Grim Visage (EQ)
 Gaze of the Abyss (EW)
 Crushing Maw (EE)

effects.description: Toggle: Hwei enters a tumultuous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.

basic_ability_3.description: Toggle: Hwei enters a tumultuous mood, gaining access to its abilities as well as Wash Brush. He will exit the mood upon casting any of them.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Toggled abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

ultimate.name: Spiraling Despair
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Hwei launches a globule in the target direction that collides with the first enemy  champion hit, afflicting them with an aura that grows over a few seconds. Enemies within are continually dealt magic damage and gradually  slowed.

effects.context_notes: Active: Hwei launches a globule of pure despair in the target direction that collides with the first enemy champion hit, afflicting them with an aura that grows over 3 seconds, reveals the target, and grants sight within its radius.

Active: Hwei launches a globule of pure despair in the target direction that collides with the first enemy champion hit, afflicting them with an aura that grows over 3 seconds, reveals the target, and grants sight within its radius.

effects.description: Despair: For each stack, the target is slowed by 10% for 0.25 seconds, stacking up to 12 times.

effects.context_notes: At the end of the duration or when the target dies, the aura explodes to deal magic damage to enemies within and remove all Despair stacks from affected enemies.
At the end of the duration or when the target dies, the aura explodes to deal magic damage to enemies within and remove all Despair stacks from affected enemies.

effects.description: Spiraling Despair can only be cast if Hwei has not entered a mood.

ultimate.description: Active: Hwei launches a globule of pure despair in the target direction that collides with the first enemy champion hit, afflicting them with an aura that grows over 3 seconds, reveals the target, and grants sight within its radius. Enemies within are both dealt magic damage and applied a stack of Despair every 0.25 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Applies persistent area damage for the aura and deals area damage for the explosion.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
